reviews.comment:
La verdad no es buena la atención me parece una avivada de no tener nafta super solo podiun y no tiene gasoil..

reviews.comment:
Desastre los socios somos uno más q los demás poco personal después de esta experiencia di de  baja al aca las empresas de seguro dan los mismos servicios no podes lavar nada nunca hay turno y es caro

(Translated by Google)
Disaster! The members are treated like one person, no one else. Understaffed. After this experience, I cancelled my membership. The insurance companies here offer the same services; you can't get anything washed, there's never an appointment, and it's expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURldl9PQU53EAE
